results.title: Nike Announces Job Cuts Amid Transformation Plan
NIKE, Inc. Announces Global Operations Changes
Will Nike's (NKE) Tech Layoffs and Automation Drive a New Product and Margin Playbook?
Nike drops on what Cramer calls a 'damning' downgrade
Nike (NKE) Announces Job Cuts Amid Strategic Restructuring

summary: Nike cut 1,400 jobs (2nd round this year, after 775 in January) in technology and global operations divisions as part of 'Win Now' turnaround. Consolidating tech to Oregon (Philip H. Knight Campus) and India (Nike India Technology Center). Market initially reacted positively after-hours. Short interest jumped 22.8% in April to ~56.1M shares, signaling growing bearish positioning.
